name: Back Country Ham Slice for 6
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the ham in fat until cooked through.
2. Remove the ham slice from the skillet and set aside.
3. Pour all the remaining ingredients into the skillet.
4. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Place the ham slice back into the sauce and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Serve. Serves 3.
Recipe By: I Hate to Cook Cookbook by Peg Bracken
